case_title: DAVID GONZALEZ VS. ALBERT NAGY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT NAGY, ALBERT AS INDIVIDUAL DBA A.B.
